9 
AHC_BRDG_ORG_ID 
LABEL: 
AHC Bridge Organization Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: Each organization participating in the AHC program was assigned an AHC bridge organization 
identifier. 
LONG NAME: AHC_BRDG_ORG_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g., B05) 
COMMENT: 
This is an identifier assigned within the AHC data system and
